programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Most Medieval: Flea market felonies with Lori Loughlin. A case hits very close to home for amateur sleuth Jennifer when she finds a body crammed into a vintage suit of armour she purchased. (2017)
Thriller with Dan Payne. Kyle and Sophia rekindle their love, but drama erupts as Claire, Kyle's ex-fling, frames Sophia for assault. When her schemes fail, Claire goes full-blown villain. (2018)
Thriller starring Holly Deveaux. After moving in with their mum and her new husband, two sisters uncover a chilling trail of lies and deception (2017).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Murder: Crime mystery with Dick Van Dyke. When his long-time patient is accused of murder, amateur sleuth Dr Mark Sloan is convinced he's innocent. (1992)
Miles to Go: Mary searches for the missing son of a witness who won't testify unless he's able to visit his child. Some disturbing information about the father and son is revealed.
Witness For The Prosecution: Castle takes to the stand to testify as the key witness in a murder case. But when new evidence is suddenly revealed, Castle questions his judgement.
...Mishaps: The heat is rising for beloved TV show host and chef Billie Blessings when a poisoned cake leaves her mixed up in murder... (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Mishaps: The heat is rising for beloved TV show host and chef Billie Blessings when a poisoned cake leaves her mixed up in murder... (2018)
Obsession: Part 1: Dr Sloan is shocked when the serial bomber he once helped to convict seemingly carries out another bombing shortly after his execution. Part 1 of 2.
Obsession: Part 2: Dr Sloan and the team continue in their quest to prove who is responsible for the bombings. Can they unearth the bomber's next target before it is too late? Part 2 of 2.
The Great Twain Robbery: Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton is asked to investigate when a recently discovered Mark Twain manuscript leads to murder.
Ballad For A Blue Lady: Jessica's latest investigation sees her in Nashville where she is tasked with finding the person responsible for poisoning her close friends.
The Gambler: The opportunity to go undercover and investigate a mob boss threatens to lure Bobby back into gambling addiction. Meanwhile, concerns mount over Levi's wellbeing.
Dead Red: When the son of a Russian diplomat is murdered, an embassy security official is sent to observe the team's investigation - but has he been sent to do more than just observe?
Line Up Or Shut Up: Carrie and Al investigate when a young man is found dead in the luxury sports car he was delivering to a diplomat.
Jailbait: A witness's teen daughter becomes involved in a reckless romance. Elsewhere, Raphael's mother visits and begins planning an engagement party without Mary's consent.
Crime mystery with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu as a culinary expert and a no-nonsense detective team up to investigate a shocking crime at a five-star restaurant. (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime mystery with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu as a culinary expert and a no-nonsense detective team up to investigate a shocking crime at a five-star restaurant. (2015)
...Bone To Pick: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. When her friend dies, super sleuth Aurora inherits a house, a hidden skull and a spine-tingling mystery to solve... (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Bone To Pick: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. When her friend dies, super sleuth Aurora inherits a house, a hidden skull and a spine-tingling mystery to solve... (2015)
Thriller with Wendie Malick. Barbara longs to be a grandmother. In fact, she would kill for it. Can her new daughter-in-law expose her deadly intentions before it's too late (2020)?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Thriller starring Anna Hutchison. A public relations guru likes to keep a low profile, but risks her reputation to help a fading action star accused of killing his ex-wife (2019).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Sycamore Street: Amateur sleuth Dr Mark Sloan suspects he has another bad case of murder on his hands when one of his former students jumps off a tall building. (1992)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Sycamore Street: Amateur sleuth Dr Mark Sloan suspects he has another bad case of murder on his hands when one of his former students jumps off a tall building. (1992)
Jailbait: A witness's teen daughter becomes involved in a reckless romance. Elsewhere, Raphael's mother visits and begins planning an engagement party without Mary's consent.
Dead Red: When the son of a Russian diplomat is murdered, an embassy security official is sent to observe the team's investigation - but has he been sent to do more than just observe?
...Without Pity: After his daughter calls him from Los Rios, pleading for help, Dr Mark Sloan arrives to find a seemingly tranquil town harbouring dark and deadly secrets. (2002)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Without Pity: After his daughter calls him from Los Rios, pleading for help, Dr Mark Sloan arrives to find a seemingly tranquil town harbouring dark and deadly secrets. (2002)
Resurrection: Part 1: Steve Sloan and Agent Wagner search through the rubble of Community General in the aftermath of the bombing. Part 1 of 2.
Resurrection: Part 2: Dr Sloan is forced to form a plan of action to prevent further bombings when he is faced with the suspected bomber. Part 2 of 2.
Family Doctor: Jessica and Dr Hazlitt find themselves in grave danger when they are kidnapped by a prominent Boston crime family.
Suspicion Of Murder: Can Dennis Stanton prove his innocence after he is accused of killing his girlfriend's estranged husband?
Into Thin Air: Sue is tasked with investigating the kidnapping of a college student.
The Blame Game: Alexis and the 12th precinct must race to save Castle and Beckett after they're abducted and forced to solve a number of disturbing puzzles to slowly gain back their freedom.
Maps and Legends: The murder of an urban explorer leads Carrie and Al to hunt for both a killer and, the treasure the victim was trying to locate under the streets of New York before he died.
Training Video: Mary shares her expertise with a film crew making a training video for U.S. Marshals. Marshall makes arrangements for an elderly mobster in WITSEC to go to his son's funeral.
...Murder: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth, Jennifer, finds an old recorder and tape of a man pleading for his life. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Murder: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth, Jennifer, finds an old recorder and tape of a man pleading for his life. (2017)

Mystery drama with Eric Mabius. The Postables find a letter in an antique vase, which could be sold to save a family's farm. But the vase's suspicious origin leaves them with a moral dilemma... (2017)
